calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING , REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Aug-01-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Sheila Robello for Paul Spiegel (Trustee). Lori Spiegl (Beneficiary) in Propria Persona. Carin Pollock (Beneficiary) in Propria Persona.

Ms. Robello stated that the Trustee paid himself $1,200.00 for two quarterly fees based one the 1% value of the estate, that he has not deducted the accountant's fees, and that $8,000.00 was paid directly by Mr. Spiegel to Martin Harris for an eight year forensic accounting which is not reflected in the accounting. Ms. Spiegel stated that she was objecting to legal fees for their objections, and expressed concern about the number of People involved in locating the assets and fees required in amount of $28,000.00 being higher the shares of the Beneficiaries. The accounting petition was taken under submission.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy M. Benton.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING , REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Jun-10-2013 Continued To Jun-26-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #8, REPORT
Off Calendar Aug-08-2011 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Kathleen Hunt for and with Paul Spiegel. Karen Pollock in Propria Persona. Lori Spiegel in Propria Persona.

The Court expressed concern about the amount of funds spent trying to trace the assets. Mr. Spiegel and Ms. Hunt explained the difficulty and time spent in tracking the assets, stated that they needed help in doing so and presented oral argument to support fees. Ms. Spiegel expressed concern about the fees, the complexity that has been drawn in the case and the manner in which the Trust has been managed. The matter was taken under submission.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Payne.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #8, REPORT
Off Calendar Jun-15-2011 Continued To Jul-13-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #8, REPORT
Off Calendar Jun-13-2011 Continued To Jun-15-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #8, REPORT
Off Calendar May-16-2011 Continued To Jun-13-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Kathleen Hunt for Paul Spiegel. Carin Pollock in Propria Persona. Lori Spiegel in Propria Persona.

Ms. Hunt addressed the issues raised in the Examiner's notes, stated that she filed a declaration that addressed all of the Examiner's questions and explained why it took so long to get the accounting approved. Ms. Speigel stated that evertything/all of the assets were listed in the 7th Account, questioned why so many people were needed to handle a Trust of this size and stated that she has three pages of objections but did not file them. The accounting petition was continued to June 13, 2011 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. Ms. Speigel will file her objections within one week.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy Barrientos.
